name: GPL Holdings, Inc.
business: GPL Holdings is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing new therapies and providing low-cost quality healthcare products including prescription drugs, non-prescription drugs, medical supplies, dental supplies, medical equipment, and dental equipment. It operates through its wholly owned subsidiary Global Pharma Labs, Inc., focusing on completing clinical trials for its osteoarthritis therapy and seeking patents for therapies for onychomycosis, genital herpes, cold sores, shingles, and erectile dysfunction. The company has a distribution agreement with Vitam Dandum Global Pharma Labs Limited in Zambia and plans to apply for pharmacy licenses in California.
namedCustomers: Vitam Dandum Global Pharma Labs Limited

exposures.sentence: The Company is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing new therapies and to providing low-cost quality healthcare products including prescription drugs, non- prescription drugs, medical supplies, dental supplies, medical equipment, and dental equipment.

catalysts.event: File Regulation CF or Regulation A offering statement
catalysts.sentence: We intend to file a Regulation CF or Regulation A offering statement in 2024 to pursue our funding objectives.

catalysts.event: Apply for retail and wholesale pharmacy licenses in California
catalysts.sentence: We plan to apply for retail pharmacy and wholesale pharmacy license in the state of California in 2024.
